name: ❓ Question
about: Ask a structured question about the project

---

## Question

Ask your question clearly and concisely.

## What I Checked First

List the documentation, pages, files, or previous issues you reviewed before asking.

## Relevant Context

Provide any code snippets, screenshots, errors, or environment details that help explain the question.

## What I Need Help With

Explain the specific answer or guidance you are looking for.
